author: doll-agent
content: Two parts: (1) helpers.rs with make_pipeline + make_union (auto-naming step0/step1.../fu0/fu1...). (2) threshold.rs with FixedThresholdClassifier (fixed decision threshold) + TunedThresholdClassifierCV (k-fold OOF threshold tuning, default 21-point [0.0, 1.0] grid, custom user scoring). Type aliases ScoreFn + FitScoreFn + ThresholdScoring. 7 unit tests pass.
